calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-16-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem John Gulick, Jr., clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Beth Lewis, respondent, appears. No appearance by David Chan, appellant. Ms. Lewis on 12/8/05, filed an objection to the appeal, as being utimeley. Ms. Lewis, previously sworn, testifies that the appeal is untimely. Judge Pro Tem Gulick dismisses the appeal. (Mr. Chan appears, late at 9:15am, after court had dismissed the appeal.)
